## What does this PR change?

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Spec clarification (no behavior change)
- [ ] Spec addition (new field, format, or behavior — backwards compatible)
- [ ] Spec correction (fixes incorrect or ambiguous text)
- [ ] Reference implementation fix
- [ ] Test vector addition
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related issue or RFC

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] SPEC.md is updated if behavior changes
- [ ] Test vectors are added or updated if verification behavior changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md is updated
- [ ] All existing test vectors still pass against the reference implementation
- [ ] No private keys, real agent files, or sensitive data included
- [ ] No internal file paths, server URLs, or API endpoints included
